description_long: This ornate sconce features a central mounting plate from which six elegantly curved arms radiate outward, each supporting a lampshade with a pleated texture. The arms and central structure are adorned with numerous hanging crystal pendants, adding a touch of luxury and refracting light for a sparkling effect. The fixture is primarily constructed from polished metal, likely chrome or silver-plated, with glass or acrylic lampshades and decorative crystal elements. The overall design is symmetrical, with each arm equally spaced around the central axis, and the crystal drops are distributed evenly for visual balance. The top of the sconce has a broad, rounded canopy for secure ceiling mounting. The style is reminiscent of classic European chandeliers, blending traditional elegance with a touch of modern refinement.
description: A luxurious, multi-arm sconce with pleated lampshades and hanging crystal pendants, finished in polished metal. The design is symmetrical and ornate, evoking classic chandelier aesthetics.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all six lampshades and the symmetrical arrangement of crystal pendants.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the depth of the arms and the layered arrangement of crystals.
description_view_2: Rear view with the central mounting plate and the backs of the lampshades visible, highlighting the fixture's symmetry.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, similar to view 1, showing the curvature of the arms and crystal distribution.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture exhibits a classic, vintage chandelier style with ornate arms, pleated lampshades, and abundant crystal decorations, evoking European elegance and sophistication.
